prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合科类最低录取位次分别为约3226名→4568名→5453名→5544名→5016名。2021至2024年整体呈后移趋势（位次数字增大），2025年出现明显回 升（位次数字减小至5016），近两年波动幅度约500名。2025年基准位次约5016名；该校在上海市综合科类招生计划：2021年172人、2022年181人、2023年190人 、2024年207人、2025年198人；2026年计划增至225人（较2025年扩招约13.6%），扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解，位次数字有增大倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东师范大学 为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名稳定在第29–31名（2026年排名第29），属于全国顶尖师范类高校，在上海四大985高校中占据重要地位；2026年高考周期内该校声誉评价未见明显负面事件；抖音学校热度总排名第28位（评价"较热"），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度较高；历史投档异常记录中未 出现该校，录取走势相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，教育学、体育学、统计学获评A+，中国语言文学、世界史、地理学、心理学、数学、生态学、软件工程获评 A，外国语言文学、物理学、生物学、马克思主义理论获评A-，A类学科总数达14个，学科实力雄厚，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气 工程等工科专业持续高热推荐；师范/教育类专业呈分化观望态势，但华东师范大学作为顶尖师范985仍具品牌效应；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人（较2025年49276人增长 约35.4%），考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；华东师范大学位于上海市，为本省 唯一985师范院校，本地招生占比高，上海考生对本校认可度强，地域偏好有利于维持较高报考热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5016名、2026年扩招约13.6%（位次数 字增大方向）、上海市考生总数大幅增长约35.4%（位次数字减小方向）、抖音热度较热及学科实力强劲（位次数字减小方向）等多重因素，扩招效应被考生大增和声誉热度上升 所抵消，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移（更难进）。预测最低位次约5346名，波动区间4846–5846名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 统计学（双学位，与计算机科学与技术双学士学位培养）
- 心理学（双学位，与计算机科学与技术双学士学位培养）
- 汉语言文学
- 数学与应用数学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 软件工程
- 计算机科学与技术
- 数据科学与大数据技术
- 金融学类（含金融学、经济学）
- 法学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会学类（含社会学、社会工作）
- 公共管理类（含人力资源管理、行政管理）
- 环境科学与工程类（含环境科学、环境生态工程）
- 听力与言语康复学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4846–5846名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向（软件工程、计算机、数据科学等热门工科专业），一档专业（统计学双学位、心理学双学位、汉语言文学等） 可作为冲刺选择，三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（接近4846名）时可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（5846名）时建议以二档稳妥专业为主，辅以三档保 底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 3226 → 4568 → 5453 → 5544 → 5016. From 2021 to 2024, the overall trend was backward (ranking numbers increased), with a significant rebound in 2025 (ranking number decreased to 5016), and a fluctuation of about 500 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5016. The university's enrollment plan for Shanghai's comprehensive category: 172 in 2021, 181 in 2022, 190 in 2023, 207 in 2024, 198 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 225 (an expansion of about 13.6% compared to 2025), a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly and tending to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking steadily at 29–31 in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (29th in 2026), belonging to the top normal universities nationwide, occupying an important position among the four 985 universities in Shanghai. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, there were no obvious negative events in the university's reputation evaluation. The university's Douyin popularity ranks 28th overall (rated as 'relatively hot'), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting high application attention. No abnormal admission records have occurred for this university, and the admission trend is relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Education, Physical Education, and Statistics received A+, Chinese Language and Literature, World History, Geography, Psychology, Mathematics, Ecology, and Software Engineering received A, Foreign Language and Literature, Physics, Biology, and Marxist Theory received A-, with a total of 14 A-level disciplines, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. Normal/education majors show a differentiated wait-and-see trend, but East China Normal University, as a top normal 985, still has brand effect. The total number of Shanghai college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 66,700 (an increase of about 35.4% from 49,276 in 2025), with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, the only 985 normal university in the province, with a high proportion of local enrollment. Shanghai candidates have strong recognition of the university, and regional preference helps maintain high application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5016, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 13.6% (tending to increase the ranking number), the significant increase in Shanghai candidates of about 35.4% (tending to decrease the ranking number), relatively hot Douyin popularity, and strong academic strength (tending to decrease the ranking number), the expansion effect is offset by the surge in candidates and increased reputation and popularity. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5346, with a fluctuation range of 4846–5846.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Statistics (Double Degree, with Computer Science and Technology dual bachelor's degree program)
- Psychology (Double Degree, with Computer Science and Technology dual bachelor's degree program)
- Chinese Language and Literature
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Software Engineering
- Computer Science and Technology
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Finance (including Finance, Economics)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Sociology (including Sociology, Social Work)
- Public Administration (including Human Resource Management, Administrative Management)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Environmental Science, Environmental Ecological Engineering)
- Hearing and Speech Rehabilitation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4846–5846, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction (Software Engineering, Computer Science, Data Science, and other popular engineering majors), with Tier 1 majors (Statistics Double Degree, Psychology Double Degree, Chinese Language and Literature, etc.) as sprint choices, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (close to 4846), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; when the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (5846), it is recommended to mainly choose stable Tier 2 majors, supplemented by Tier 3 safety options.
